Architecture Overview"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"BEAM (Biological-inspired Episodic-Associative Memory) is the core architecture powering Mnemosyne. It models human memory organization with four distinct tiers, each optimized for different retention and retrieval patterns."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"The Four Memory Tiers"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"chart":"\ngraph TB\n  subgraph Input[\"Agent Input\"]\n      I1[Observation]\n      I2[Conversation]\n      I3[Tool Result]\n  end\n\n  subgraph BEAM[\"BEAM Memory System\"]\n      WM[Working Memory\n      Short-term, 1K entries\n      <100ms access]\n      EM[Episodic Memory\n      Long-term experiences\n      Hybrid retrieval]\n      SM[Semantic Memory\n      Structured facts\n      Temporal graph]\n      SP[Scratchpad\n      Temporary workspace\n      Reasoning buffer]\n  end\n\n  I1 -->|immediate| WM\n  I2 -->|immediate| WM\n  I3 -->|immediate| WM\n  WM -->|consolidation| EM\n  WM -->|extraction| SM\n  EM -->|recall| WM\n  SM -->|query| WM\n  SP -->|flush| WM\n\n  style WM fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7\n  style EM fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706\n  style SM fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a\n  style SP fill:#faf5ff,stroke:#9333ea\n"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The agent's immediate context window. Holds recent observations, conversation history, and active tool results. Fastest access (<100ms), limited capacity (~1000 entries), and subject to eviction."}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f"],["$L20","$L21","$L22","$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29"],"$L2a"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@2b"]},null,false,"$@2b"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L2c",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$2d",["$L2e"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}

34:I[97367,["/_next/static/chunks/0-9~~pyw_lp7w.js","/_next/static/chunks/0n4z.7yu76je-.js"],"ViewportBoundary"]

38:I[83922,["/_next/static/chunks/0-9~~pyw_lp7w.js","/_next/static/chunks/0n4z.7yu76je-.js","/_next/static/chunks/0~yfrcgkgynvy.js"],"PageNav"]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
9:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency"}],": Sub-100ms median"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity"}],": Configurable (default 1000 entries)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Eviction"}],": LRU with importance weighting"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Persistence"}],": Survives process restarts via SQLite"]}],"\n"]}]
a:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Long-term storage for experiences, conversations, and events. Organized chronologically with rich metadata. Uses hybrid retrieval combining vector similarity and full-text search."}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
d:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retention"}],": Permanent (until explicit deletion)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retrieval"}],": Hybrid (vector + FTS5)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compression"}],": AAAK algorithm for context windows"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Consolidation"}],": Automatic during sleep cycles"]}],"\n"]}]
e:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Structured knowledge extracted from experiences. Stores facts, relationships, and concepts as a temporal knowledge graph with subject-predicate-object triples."}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
11:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Format"}],": Temporal knowledge graph (triples)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Query"}],": Graph traversal + vector similarity"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Update"}],": Incremental fact extraction from Working Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Schema"}],": Flexible, no predefined ontology"]}],"\n"]}]
12:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Scratchpad"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":"A temporary workspace for reasoning, planning, and intermediate computations. Analogous to human working memory's manipulation buffer."}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
15:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Lifetime"}],": Session-bound (cleared on agent restart)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Use case"}],": Chain-of-thought, planning, scratch calculations"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Integration"}],": Flushes insights to Working Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Isolation"}],": Per-agent, not shared"]}],"\n"]}]
16:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Data Flow"}]
17:["$","$L7",null,{"chart":"\nsequenceDiagram\n  participant Agent\n  participant WM as Working Memory\n  participant SP as Scratchpad\n  participant EM as Episodic Memory\n  participant SM as Semantic Memory\n\n  Agent->>WM: observe(event)\n  WM->>WM: store + index\n  Agent->>SP: write(thought)\n  SP->>SP: reason\n  SP->>WM: flush(insight)\n  Agent->>WM: recall(query)\n  WM->>EM: search(query)\n  EM->>WM: return results\n  WM->>SM: query(facts)\n  SM->>WM: return triples\n  WM->>Agent: consolidated context\n"}]
18:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Sleep Consolidation"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne runs background \"sleep\" cycles that:"}]
1a:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compress"}]," Working Memory entries using AAAK algorithm"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}]," high-importance entries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extract"}]," facts and relationships to Semantic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evict"}]," low-importance entries per retention policy"]}],"\n"]}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Configure interval via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_CONSOLIDATION_INTERVAL"}]," (default: 3600s)."]}]
1c:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Design Philosophy"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's architecture prioritizes:"}]
1e:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Locality"}],": All data in SQLite — no network calls for retrieval"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transparency"}],": Every operation is inspectable and debuggable"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Efficiency"}],": Sub-100ms retrieval for typical workloads"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Flexibility"}],": Works standalone or as a Hermes plugin"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Privacy"}],": No data leaves your machine by default"]}],"\n"]}]
1f:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2f",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Comparison with Vector-Only Stores"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Unlike pure vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate), Mnemosyne combines dense embeddings with structured storage, full-text search, and temporal relationships. This hybrid approach delivers more precise retrieval for agent use cases where exact facts matter as much as semantic similarity."}]}]]}]]}]}]
